The meeting deflated me and I can't shake the mood.
Everything I produced today feels mediocre and grey.
The work is fine but I'm just not in it.
I'm grateful they reached out but I just feel hollow.
The conversation was nice and I'm still sad after.
I miss someone and the day has a dull ache in it.
The grey sky outside matches how I feel inside.
I walked through the park and nothing landed.
Even the sunshine isn't helping today.
The meal didn't taste like anything; I ate without noticing.
I made dinner and stared at it for a while before eating.
The food was fine but I'm not really here for it.
I slept but woke up with the same heaviness as last night.
I don't want to get out of bed but I'm not tired.
The morning came and the sadness was already waiting.
I went for a walk hoping to shake it; I didn't.
The run helped a little, then the mood came back.
I moved my body and the gloom moved with me.
I stared out the train window the whole way home.
The drive felt longer than it was; my mind was elsewhere.
I walked home the long way and didn't feel any better for it.
I scrolled past everything without feeling much.
The song made me sadder and I kept it on anyway.
I keep starting things and putting them down again.
The apartment feels too quiet and I don't know what to do with myself.
I'm doing the dishes slowly and feeling sorry for myself.
I should water the plants but it all feels pointless tonight.
